entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 17
NORTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SNOW AND RAIN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
